mv_MerchantRiskProfile.Query: Transactions | summarize TxnCount=count(), TotalAmount=sum(amount), AvgAmount=avg(amount), UniqueCustomers=dcount(customer_id), HighRiskCustomerTxns=countif(customer_risk_score > 75), NightTxns=countif(datetime_part('hour', timestamp) >= 0 and datetime_part('hour', timestamp) <= 6), CardNotPresentTxns=countif(card_present == false) by merchant_id, merchant_name, merchant_category, merchant_country, merchant_risk_level

mv_CustomerDailyRisk.Query: Transactions | summarize DailyTxnCount=count(), DailyAmount=sum(amount), DailyAvg=avg(amount), DailyMax=max(amount), UniqueCountries=dcount(merchant_country), UniqueMerchants=dcount(merchant_id), NightTxns=countif(datetime_part('hour', timestamp) >= 0 and datetime_part('hour', timestamp) <= 6), HighAmountTxns=countif(amount > 1000), CrossBorderTxns=countif(customer_country != merchant_country) by customer_id, bin(timestamp, 1d)

VelocityDetection.Body:
{
    Transactions
    | order by account_id, timestamp asc
    | extend prev_timestamp = prev(timestamp, 1) 
    | extend prev_account = prev(account_id, 1)
    | extend time_diff_minutes = datetime_diff('minute', timestamp, prev_timestamp)
    | where account_id == prev_account
    | extend velocity_flag = time_diff_minutes < 5  // Less than 5 min between txns
    | extend high_velocity = time_diff_minutes < 1  // Less than 1 min (critical)
    | where velocity_flag == true
    | project 
        timestamp, 
        transaction_id, 
        account_id, 
        customer_id,
        amount, 
        time_diff_minutes,
        high_velocity,
        merchant_name,
        merchant_category,
        channel
}

FraudInvestigator.Doc: Comprehensive fraud investigation for a specific customer

GeographicVelocityCheck.Body:
{
    Transactions
    | order by customer_id, timestamp asc
    | extend prev_country = prev(merchant_country, 1), prev_customer = prev(customer_id, 1), prev_timestamp = prev(timestamp, 1)
    | where customer_id == prev_customer
    | where merchant_country != prev_country
    | extend time_gap_hours = datetime_diff('hour', timestamp, prev_timestamp)
    | where time_gap_hours < 4
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | project
        timestamp,
        transaction_id,
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        from_country = prev_country,
        to_country = merchant_country,
        time_gap_hours,
        amount,
        merchant_name,
        channel,
        customer_risk_score,
        severity = case(time_gap_hours < 1, 'Critical', time_gap_hours < 2, 'High', 'Medium')
    | order by time_gap_hours asc
}
GeographicVelocityCheck.Doc: Impossible travel detection - transactions from distant countries within short timeframes

Customers_View.Body:
{
    AllBankingData
    | where entity_type == "Customer"
    | project customer_id, customer_name, email, phone, address, city, state, 
              country, postal_code, account_creation_date, customer_risk_score, 
              is_high_risk_customer, ingestion_timestamp
}

RealTimeFraudDashboard.Doc: Real-time fraud dashboard summary using all detection functions

AccountTakeoverDetection.Body:
{
    Transactions
    | summarize 
        transaction_count = count(),
        unique_locations = dcount(merchant_country),
        unique_merchants = dcount(merchant_id),
        unusual_time_count = countif(datetime_part('hour', timestamp) >= 0 and datetime_part('hour', timestamp) <= 6),
        high_amount_count = countif(amount > 1000),
        total_amount = sum(amount)
        by account_id, bin(timestamp, 1h)  // 1-hour windows
    | where transaction_count > 10  // More than 10 txns in 1 hour
        or unique_locations > 3  // From 3+ countries in 1 hour
        or (unusual_time_count > 3 and high_amount_count > 2)  // Multiple late-night high-value txns
    | join kind=inner (BankAccounts) on account_id
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | project 
        timestamp,
        account_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        phone,
        account_type,
        transaction_count,
        unique_locations,
        unique_merchants,
        unusual_time_count,
        high_amount_count,
        total_amount = round(total_amount, 2),
        threat_level = case(
            unique_locations > 3 and high_amount_count > 2, "Critical",
            transaction_count > 15, "High",
            "Medium"
        )
    | order by threat_level, transaction_count desc
}

FraudSummaryKPIs.Doc: Key fraud KPIs for dashboard tiles

CustomerRiskProfile.Body:
{
    let fraud_txns = FraudDetection()
    | where is_fraudulent == true
    | summarize fraud_count = count(), total_fraud_amount = sum(amount) by customer_id;
    
    Transactions
    | summarize 
        total_transactions = count(),
        total_amount = sum(amount),
        avg_amount = avg(amount),
        max_amount = max(amount),
        unique_merchants = dcount(merchant_id),
        unique_countries = dcount(merchant_country),
        cross_border_txns = countif(customer_country != merchant_country),
        high_amount_txns = countif(amount > 1000),
        unusual_time_txns = countif(datetime_part('hour', timestamp) >= 0 and datetime_part('hour', timestamp) <= 6),
        card_not_present_txns = countif(card_present == false)
        by customer_id
    | join kind=leftouter (fraud_txns) on customer_id
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | extend 
        fraud_count = coalesce(fraud_count, 0),
        total_fraud_amount = coalesce(total_fraud_amount, 0.0)
    | extend 
        fraud_rate = round(100.0 * fraud_count / total_transactions, 2),
        cross_border_rate = round(100.0 * cross_border_txns / total_transactions, 2),
        high_amount_rate = round(100.0 * high_amount_txns / total_transactions, 2)
    // Calculate composite risk score (0-100)
    | extend computed_risk_score = 
        (fraud_rate * 0.4) +  // 40% weight to fraud rate
        (cross_border_rate * 0.2) +  // 20% weight to cross-border
        (high_amount_rate * 0.15) +  // 15% weight to high amounts
        (customer_risk_score * 0.25)  // 25% weight to original risk score
    | extend risk_category = case(
        computed_risk_score >= 75, "Critical",
        computed_risk_score >= 50, "High",
        computed_risk_score >= 25, "Medium",
        "Low"
    )
    | project 
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        phone,
        city,
        state,
        country,
        original_risk_score = customer_risk_score,
        computed_risk_score = round(computed_risk_score, 2),
        risk_category,
        total_transactions,
        fraud_count,
        fraud_rate,
        total_amount = round(total_amount, 2),
        total_fraud_amount = round(total_fraud_amount, 2),
        avg_amount = round(avg_amount, 2),
        max_amount,
        unique_merchants,
        unique_countries,
        cross_border_txns,
        cross_border_rate,
        high_amount_txns,
        unusual_time_txns,
        card_not_present_txns
    | order by computed_risk_score desc
}

MerchantCategoryAnomaly.Body:
{
    let customer_category_baseline = Transactions
    | summarize baseline_amount = avg(amount), baseline_count = count() by customer_id, merchant_category;
    Transactions
    | summarize recent_amount = sum(amount), recent_count = count() by customer_id, merchant_category, bin(timestamp, 1d)
    | join kind=inner (customer_category_baseline) on customer_id, merchant_category
    | where recent_amount > (baseline_amount * 5) or recent_count > (baseline_count * 3)
    | extend anomaly_ratio = round(recent_amount / baseline_amount, 2)
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | project
        timestamp,
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        merchant_category,
        recent_amount = round(recent_amount, 2),
        baseline_amount = round(baseline_amount, 2),
        anomaly_ratio,
        recent_count,
        baseline_count,
        customer_risk_score,
        severity = case(anomaly_ratio > 10, 'Critical', anomaly_ratio > 5, 'High', 'Medium')
    | order by anomaly_ratio desc
}
MerchantCategoryAnomaly.Doc: Detect unusual merchant category spending patterns per customer

CrossBorderFraud.Body:
{
    Transactions
    | where customer_country != merchant_country
    | where amount > 100  // Focus on significant amounts
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | project 
        timestamp,
        transaction_id,
        customer_name,
        customer_country,
        merchant_name,
        merchant_country,
        amount,
        currency,
        channel,
        customer_risk_score,
        merchant_risk_level
    | extend risk_level = case(
        amount > 1000 and merchant_risk_level == "High", "Critical",
        amount > 500, "High",
        "Medium"
    )
    | order by amount desc
}

AmountAnomalyDetection.Body:
{
    let customer_avg = Transactions
    | summarize 
        avg_amount = avg(amount),
        max_amount = max(amount),
        total_transactions = count()
        by customer_id;
    Transactions
    | join kind=inner (customer_avg) on customer_id
    | extend deviation_ratio = amount / avg_amount
    | where deviation_ratio > 5  // Transaction is 5x higher than average
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | project 
        timestamp,
        transaction_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        amount,
        avg_amount = round(avg_amount, 2),
        deviation_ratio = round(deviation_ratio, 2),
        merchant_name,
        merchant_category,
        total_transactions,
        customer_risk_score
    | order by deviation_ratio desc
}

FraudAlertTransform.Body:
{
    FraudDetection()
    | where is_fraudulent == true
    | extend alert_id = strcat('ALERT-', transaction_id)
    | extend alert_timestamp = now()
    | extend alert_status = 'New'
    | project 
        alert_id,
        transaction_id,
        timestamp,
        customer_id,
        account_id,
        merchant_id,
        merchant_name,
        amount,
        fraud_score,
        fraud_type,
        is_fraudulent,
        unusual_time,
        unusual_location,
        amount_flag,
        high_risk_merchant,
        high_risk_customer,
        card_not_present_risk,
        channel,
        merchant_country,
        customer_country,
        alert_timestamp,
        alert_status
}
FraudAlertTransform.Doc: Transform detected fraud into alerts using FraudDetection function

UnusualTimeDetection.Body:
{
    Transactions
    | extend hour = datetime_part('hour', timestamp)
    | extend day_of_week = dayofweek(timestamp)
    // Flag unusual times: 12 AM - 6 AM
    | where hour >= 0 and hour <= 6
    | where amount > 200  // Focus on significant amounts
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | join kind=inner (BankAccounts) on account_id
    | project 
        timestamp,
        hour,
        day_of_week,
        transaction_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        phone,
        amount,
        merchant_name,
        merchant_category,
        channel,
        account_type,
        customer_risk_score
    | order by timestamp desc
}

Transactions_View.Body:
{
    AllBankingData
    | where entity_type == "Transaction"
    | project transaction_id, timestamp, account_id, customer_id, merchant_id, 
              merchant_name, merchant_category, amount, currency, transaction_type, 
              channel, card_present, merchant_country, customer_city, customer_country, 
              customer_risk_score, merchant_risk_level, ingestion_timestamp
}

MultiChannelSwitching.Body:
{
    Transactions
    | order by customer_id, timestamp asc
    | extend prev_channel = prev(channel, 1), prev_customer = prev(customer_id, 1), prev_timestamp = prev(timestamp, 1)
    | where customer_id == prev_customer
    | where channel != prev_channel
    | extend switch_gap_minutes = datetime_diff('minute', timestamp, prev_timestamp)
    | where switch_gap_minutes < 30
    | summarize 
        channel_switches = count(),
        channels_used = make_set(channel),
        total_amount = sum(amount),
        first_switch = min(timestamp),
        last_switch = max(timestamp)
        by customer_id, bin(timestamp, 1h)
    | where channel_switches >= 3
    | join kind=inner (Customers) on customer_id
    | project
        timestamp,
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        email,
        phone,
        channel_switches,
        channels_used,
        total_amount = round(total_amount, 2),
        first_switch,
        last_switch,
        customer_risk_score,
        severity = case(channel_switches >= 5, 'Critical', channel_switches >= 3, 'High', 'Medium')
    | order by channel_switches desc
}
MultiChannelSwitching.Doc: Detect rapid channel switching - indicator of account compromise
